parsed_review.summary: CP00-214 is a clean, internally consistent descriptor-only closeout pack covering 10 RP06 units (RP06.P04.M05.S15-RP06.P04.M06.S02): the RP06.P04.M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail (8 rows) and the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head (2 rows). Binding agreement was verified across the live closeout-pack-plan (entry at line 413), manifest plan_binding_snapshot, contract current_pack, DMS_CORE_CP214_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:278), and the dedicated tests (model.test.js:1672-1721). Deliverable distribution (implementation:4, fixture:1, test:1, hermes_evidence:1, claude_review:1, ui:2) and micro-title counts (Permission And Audit Binding:8, Synthetic Fixture Set:2) match the prompt baseline; source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65... matches between plan and manifest. Descriptor-only/no-write boundaries are enforced: DMS_CORE_CP214_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION inherits the full CP198->CP213 chain (executes_ui_runtime, dispatches_build_runtime, exposes_unauthorized_count, promotes_claude_to_final_approval, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation all false), the tail validator (validators.js:3695) asserts every row descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false plus state_snapshot/unauthorized_count/build_runtime/hermes_receipt/claude_approval/real_data safety fields backed by frozen row extras, and no fs/network/db/process calls exist in packages/dms/src. Claude is read-only and explicitly not final approver (allowed_tools [Read,Grep,Glob]; claude_is_final_approval=false; human approval required for CP00-215 runtime opening), consistent in the contract projection. Hermes is used only as a deterministic review packet/receipt (receipt_shape descriptor_only_ui_binding_tail_no_write; emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. No production-readiness or enterprise-trust overclaim: manifest production_ready=false / status implemented_pending_review, with production_ready_candidate=true reflecting only passing local validation. CP178+ hardening blockers (auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_or_enterprise_trust_claim) are defined, and the readiness auth preflight returned valid non-empty JSON. The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are expectedly absent at this stage and gated to be produced before commit; their absence is correct pipeline state, not a gap. Unrelated dirty UI-workstream files are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
